Target / Acceptance: Single replica V1; pod restart must resume reconcile within one reconcile interval (≤ 30 s)
Rationale: Day-2 automation must survive node churn
V1 Notes: MVP — single Deployment; leader-election optional post-V1

Target / Acceptance: No unplanned Bolt/HTTP outage during V1 scale actions (config restart may cause brief blip)
V1 Notes: Scale-only in V1 — no rolling Neo4j upgrade

Target / Acceptance: Recorded service downtime ≤ 5 s per client during patch/minor upgrade
P95 < 5 s from CR change to first reconcile action (V1); target < 1 s post-V1
Rationale: GitOps and status must feel responsive
V1 Notes: Aspirational — not gated on metrics in V1 (OP-1-007 deferred)

Target / Acceptance: RSS ≤ 200 MiB while watching 500 namespaces / 50 clusters
≥ 150 MB/s sustained to object store when network allows
Namespace Role/RoleBinding for V1; no wildcard verbs on managed resources
Run as non-root (UID 7474); drop unnecessary capabilities
Rationale: Aligns with restricted PSS where enforced

Target / Acceptance: Admin password Secret mounted read-only; no secrets in logs
Cluster inter-member TLS when mode: Cluster; client Bolt/HTTPS TLS post-V1
V1 Notes: V1 cluster TLS only — plain HTTP+Bolt client path

Target / Acceptance: NetworkPolicies restricting Neo4j traffic documented as platform pattern
Controllers use exponential back-off; fatal errors surface in status conditions
Re-applying identical CR produces no spurious object updates
Operator refuses upgrade when Neo4j store migration required
Prometheus metrics for controller_runtime and custom neo4j_* gauges
OTEL spans for reconcile paths and Cypher execution
JSON or structured text logs; no secrets; actionable error messages
V1 Notes: Minimal logging in V1; full hygiene post-V1

Target / Acceptance: Versioned API with conversion webhook on breaking changes
Chart/manifest changes follow SemVer; major on breaking install contract
Standalone Ready < 3 min; 3-node Cluster Ready < 5 min on reference kind cluster
P95 HTTP < 300 ms for UI endpoints under 50 req/s
V1 Notes: Reference PRD — UI not in scope

Target / Acceptance: Target n-2 Kubernetes minor versions; CI on kind + one cloud smoke
V1 Notes: V1 CI on kind; cloud matrix in test plan

Target / Acceptance: Same `Neo4j` CR works on kind AKS EKS GKE OpenShift with documented platform deltas
V1 Notes: V1 validates kind + one cloud; full matrix P1

Target / Acceptance: Kubernetes Events + Git history for security CRD changes ≥ 1 year
OpenAPI / spec.md + 3 sample manifests updated per release
